message:
feat(pager,compat): RefCell for txn_read_cache interior mutability, expand Transaction API

Two related improvements:

1. Pager txn_read_cache interior mutability (pager.rs):
   - Change txn_read_cache from HashMap to RefCell<HashMap> to enable
     cache population during &self page reads (PageReader::read_page
     takes &self, not &mut self)
   - All access sites updated: .borrow() for reads, .borrow_mut() for
     inserts
   - Both construction sites wrap HashMap::new() in RefCell::new()

2. Transaction API expansion (compat/transaction.rs):
   - query_row_with_params(): parameterized single-row query
   - query_row_map(): single-row query with mapping closure
   - query_map_collect(): multi-row query collecting via mapping closure
   - execute_batch(): delegates to new Connection::execute_batch
   - last_insert_rowid(): convenience wrapper around SELECT
   All delegate to the underlying Connection, rounding out the
   Transaction API so callers don't need to break encapsulation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
